title: Junior Master Data Specialist
description: Exclusive Networks is a global trusted cybersecurity specialist for digital infrastructure helping to drive the transition to a totally trusted digital future for all people and organisations.Our distinctive approach to distribution gives partners more opportunity and more customer relevance. Our specialism is their strength - equipping them to capitalise on rapidly evolving technologies and transformative business models.The Exclusive Networks story is a global one with a services-first ideology at its core, harnessing innovation and disruption to deliver partner value. With offices in 40 countries andthe ability to service customers in over 150 countries across five continents, Exclusive Networks has a unique 'local sale, global scale' model, combining the extreme focus and value of local independents with the scale and service delivery of a single worldwide distribution powerhouse.Master Data Specialist Job DescriptionHelp to streamline the Data support process, ticket transparency and customer UX in maintaining central Master Data (Business Partners, SKUs, pricing))Setting and delivering of KPIs, and SLAs as agreed with the Business Data Team LeaderAdherence and reinforcement of the group ERP projects' Finance and IS Data Governance policiesBuilding strong relationship with country data stewards and country functional teamsCollaborate and communicate with Back End Tools teams (NetSuite, SAP) and colleagues to facilitate Data support and maintenance tasksAssist in the cleansing, translation, and migration of data so it can be effectively moved between ERP systems.Understand the usage and consumption of Data in the Companies chosen ERPCurate standard set of data migration templates, and country specific migration templates.Assistance with periodic pricing updates (many systems)Candidate profileExperienceBachelor / Master's degree or equivalent experience.Experience handling Data requests and Data Migration for user base in excess of 1000 in ERP & CRM Setups.ERP Data Steward Experience is mandatory - 3 years in maintaining Master Data (SAP and/or NetSuite appreciated)English, French fluency is a must. Written Arabic skills also a must havePersonality & SkillsExperience in International ERP Data Management and projects.Data Management, Data security and compliance experienceExperience working in a multicultural team with remote managementGood personal computer and business solutions software skills.High level understanding of Trading (order processing, logistic, invoicing) and Accounting processes.Expertise on CRM, OTC, P2P,R2R, AP/AR, GLStrong Analytical and Problem-solving skills required.Strong presentation/ communication / facilitation skills (oral and written).Capable of managing multiple objectives simultaneously.Self-motivated, requiring minimal direct supervision.Experience in IT Distribution or Supply Chain industry is a plus.SQL basics knowledge is a plus
